subtasks.description: Query license database to group by publisher and compute: total contract value, average cost per seat, and license count. Return aggregated metrics per publisher.

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL aggregation task: GROUP BY publisher with SUM(contract_value), AVG(cost_per_seat), and COUNT(licenses). This is a straightforward single-table aggregation with no joins or complex window functions, so small tier is sufficient and cost-effective.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
